summary: Comprehensive backend regression for iteration 144 covering External Invoice POST/PUT, Master SKU external_sku_id, lead_type/include_in_gop_metrics propagation (incl. convert-lead defaults), Return Reasons CRUD, distributor available-stock, Master COGS Components CRUD with auto-seed, and PUT /cogs/{sku_id} custom_components merge + total_cogs recompute. 25/25 functional tests PASSED, 1 intentionally skipped (system-component delete – flagged as code-review concern).

minor.issue: Endpoint hard-deletes is_system=true seeded components without any guard. Auto-seed only re-inserts when the collection is COMPLETELY empty, so a deleted seeded component (e.g. primary_packaging_cost) is permanently lost for that tenant and total_cogs computations silently drop it. Suggest: block delete (or hide) when is_system==true, or change _seed_if_empty to upsert-by-key for missing system defaults.

action_items: Protect seeded `is_system=true` COGS components from DELETE in /app/backend/routes/cogs_components.py (return 403/400). Optionally make _seed_if_empty upsert missing keys instead of bailing out when count > 0.
Consider returning 201 (not 200) on POST /api/return-reasons and POST /api/master/cogs-components for REST consistency (currently 200).
critical_code_review_comments: external_invoices_service._build_invoice_doc copies the entire payload tenant_id correctly but always overwrites updated_at on PUT (good); PUT response key is `unmatched_external_item_ids` consistent with POST.
routes/cogs_components.py: delete_component has no is_system check (line 144). This is the root cause of the DELETE concern flagged above.
server.py /api/cogs/{sku_id} PUT correctly merges custom_components (existing ∪ patch) and recomputes total_cogs by summing all active rupee components. Verified in test_put_cogs_data_merges_custom.

External invoice POST returns id == invoiceNo (not a generated INV-* code); legacy CRM POST still returns nested {invoice: {invoice_number: 'INV-YYYYMMDD-XXXX'}} — dispatch logic in server.py:6175 is shape-based and works.
/api/leads convert-lead path defaults include_in_gop_metrics correctly: B2B→True, Retail→False (verified).
seed_data_creation: Test data is created and cleaned up per-test: TEST_ external_sku_id on first SKU (reverted on teardown), TEST_ leads (deleted), TEST_ accounts (deleted), TEST_ return-reason (deleted), TEST_ cogs-component (deleted), TEST_A/TEST_B custom_components zeroed. Side-effect: during initial dev run a system component `primary_packaging_cost` was deleted by the (later-skipped) system-delete test; it has been restored via direct DB upsert.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_144.py -v` for end-to-end regression of all iteration-143/144 features. The single skipped test (test_delete_system_component_blocked) is intentional to avoid destroying tenant defaults — flip the assertion once the API guards is_system. The fixture `test_sku` mutates the first seeded SKU's external_sku_id (reverts on teardown). Account used: PATN-KOL-A26-001 / feaaaec8-fbd3-4c78-9b88-5dabc9ba2630.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. One latent risk: hard-delete on system COGS components (see backend_issues.minor) discovered during testing and worked around (DB-level restore). Recommend hardening the DELETE handler before next release.
